name: Call to Action
description: Standalone call-to-action: a centered title with one or more action buttons, on a tinted background. Use when: simple promotional CTA with button(s) and no imagery — sign-up prompt, 'Learn more', 'Get started'. Skip when: the CTA needs a visual hero (use `call-to-action-with-image`), it's just a heading (use `title`), or it's longer body text (use `text`). `title` is the centered headline. `buttons` is a list of `{ label, url }` pairs (from `shared/buttons`) — provide one primary button by default; add a second for a secondary action only if the user implies it.
